summary: Add bounded newline-delimited MCP stdio framing with partial-line carry, JSON-RPC shape checks, one-megabyte frame rejection, and newline response encoding.

decisions.decision: Treat stdio as newline-delimited JSON-RPC frames with carry for partial reads, reject malformed/oversized frames without throwing, and encode exactly one JSON response per line.
decisions.rationale: The future desktop server needs deterministic framing and a hard input bound before process integration; this seam is transport-neutral and does not enable a socket or pipe by itself.

testEvidence.criterion: The stdio framing tests pass for partial lines, multiple frames, exact response encoding, malformed JSON, and oversized-frame rejection.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused MCP stdio suite once after implementation.

red.outcome: RED: the stdio framing module was not yet present before this unit began.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 2 passed (2); Duration 415ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The framing implementation remains type-safe and source-policy clean after the bounded lint correction.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after implementation.

red.outcome: RED: the first test spelling used a fixable string-concatenation lint diagnostic.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 437 files in 212ms with source policy passed.

questions: No desktop process owns this framing yet; stdio lifecycle, initialize handshake, platform feature toggle, and AC-11.c process-off proof remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
